title: RAGBench: A Comprehensive RAG Benchmark with Fine-Grained Evaluation Metrics

defines.name: RAGBench
defines.definition: A large-scale benchmark dataset for training and evaluating retrieval-augmented generation systems across multiple industry domains and task types.

defines.name: TRACe
defines.definition: An explainable and actionable RAG evaluation framework based on a suite of cross-domain metrics.

problem: Comprehensive evaluation of RAG systems is difficult because existing benchmarks are small, inconsistent, and lack unified, explainable metrics.
